top.title: Trump says Iran ceasefire is on 'massive life support'
top.summary: The US president criticises an Iranian counteroffer to end the war, and says the month-long ceasefire is "unbelievably weak".

top.title: France seeks to move beyond colonial ties by meeting African leaders in Kenya
top.summary: In a first since these meetings started in the 1970s, this move reflects a change in France's thinking.

top.title: How the Trump-Xi summit could set superpower relations for many years to come
top.summary: Trump's whirlwind visit to China is the most significant for years - but will it bear fruit?

top.title: Not so dusty: How tech is changing woodworking
top.summary: Woodworking shops have been transformed by tech to make tools safer and more precise.

top.title: TikTok launches £3.99 subscription for no ads in UK
top.summary: Those who don't subscribe will be able to use the platform for free - but be shown personalised ads by default.

top.title: How sunburn inspired a new way to store energy
top.summary: Molecules that can capture heat could be a useful technology to decarbonise heating.
